mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SCHEDULE (task_id, id, idx, status, scheduled_at, location, special_note) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{id}, #{idx}, 'pending', #{scheduledAt}, #{location}, #{specialNote})
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, t.name AS task_name FROM SCHEDULE s LEFT JOIN TASK t ON s.task_id = t.task_id WHERE s.schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
mapper.update: UPDATE SCHEDULE SET status = #{status} WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
UPDATE SCHEDULE SET success_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, status = 'completed' WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
UPDATE SCHEDULE SET scheduled_at = #{scheduledAt} WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND status = 'pending'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SCHEDULE WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND status = 'pending'
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, t.name AS task_name FROM SCHEDULE s LEFT JOIN TASK t ON s.task_id = t.task_id WHERE s.status = 'pending' AND s.scheduled_at < SYSDATE

SELECT s.*, t.name AS task_name, t.process AS task_process FROM SCHEDULE s LEFT JOIN TASK t ON s.task_id = t.task_id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.idx = #{idx} AND s.status = 'pending' AND s.scheduled_at >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY s.scheduled_at ASC
